channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 santifer/career-ops (39296 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: santifer

📝 Repository: santifer/career-ops

📄 Descrizione: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

⭐ Stelle: 39296

🍴 Forks: 8033

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent anthropic automation career claude claude-code cli golang interview-prep job-search open-source resume

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-04T18:21:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-25T04:30:27Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 jackwener/OpenCLI (15149 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jackwener

📝 Repository: jackwener/OpenCLI

📄 Descrizione: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

⭐ Stelle: 15149

🍴 Forks: 1444

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent ai-agents ai-tools cli

]]>

item.title: 📜 HughYau/qiushi-skill (2830 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: HughYau

📝 Repository: HughYau/qiushi-skill

📄 Descrizione: 求是Skill——从经典唯物辩证法与实践哲学中提炼出一条总原则和九大方法论工具武装AI大脑。Qiushi-Skill: Build agents that investigate first, focus on the main contradiction, validate in practice, and keep pushing until the work is actually done.

⭐ Stelle: 2830

🍴 Forks: 217

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents methodology skills workflow

item.title: 📜 Manavarya09/design-extract (1529 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Manavarya09

📝 Repository: Manavarya09/design-extract

📄 Descrizione: Extract any website's complete design system with one command. DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, MCP server for Claude Code/Cursor/Windsurf, multi-platform emitters (iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, WordPress), Tailwind v4, Figma variables, shadcn/ui, CSS health audit, WCAG remediation, Chrome extension. MIT, Playwright, Node 20+.

⭐ Stelle: 1529

🍴 Forks: 143

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: accessibility agent-skill ai chrome-extension claude-code-plugin cli css cursor design-system design-to-code design-tokens dtcg figma mcp-server npx playwright shadcn-ui skills-sh tailwind web-scraping

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-15T10:11:22Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-25T04:21:29Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub
